data.title: Inventor from LA developed GOODY HAND hairbrush aimed to offer a new user-friendly design; InventHelp assisted him.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Pittsburgh, an inventor from Los Angeles, California, shared their inspiration behind creating the GOODY HAND. This innovative hairbrush was designed to be user-friendly, convenient to find, and simple to clean. The inventor aimed to provide a modern alternative to standard handheld brushes.

data.title: Stock market soars with S&P 500, Nasdaq hitting fresh highs. Google, ServiceNow, GE Vernova win big. Tesla declines.
data.description: Last week, the S&P 500 and Nasdaq reached new record peaks, propelled by promising trade agreements under the Trump administration. Among the standout performers in terms of earnings were Google, ServiceNow, and GE Vernova. Conversely, Tesla experienced a significant decline. The stock market has continuously been on an upward trajectory, with notable companies making significant gains amidst ongoing trade negotiations and corporate announcements.

data.title: Europe rejected Sarepta Therapeutics' gene therapy Elevidys, adding to a tough week for the company.
data.description: Sarepta Therapeutics faced another setback on Friday as European officials declined to approve the company's gene therapy, Elevidys. This rejection added to the challenges the company has experienced throughout the week. Sarepta Therapeutics' struggles were detailed in an article on Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Dow up after surprise data, Tesla boosts stock with robotaxi plans. - Investor's Business Daily
data.description: Following unexpected economic data, the Dow Jones index experienced a growth while Tesla's stock saw a surge, driven by the announcement of its forthcoming robotaxi service. The significant rise in the Dow Jones was noted after a meeting between Trump and Powell, illustrating positive market sentiment. This news reflects the dynamic movement in the market today, highlighting the resilience and adaptability of investors amid changing circumstances.

data.title: Volcon Inc. boosts Bitcoin holdings to 3,183 BTC worth $375 million, signals belief in Bitcoin as long-term asset.
data.description: Volcon Inc. (NASDAQ: VLCN) is intensifying its shift towards Bitcoin by disclosing its ownership of more than 3,183 Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC/USD), valued at around $375 million as of July 25. Originally focused on electric off-road vehicles, the company is now adopting a treasury strategy centered on digital assets. Co-CEO Ryan Lane stated that this move demonstrates Volcon's confidence in Bitcoin as a resilient long-term asset and a wise reserve option. By 8 a.m. ET on Thursday, Volcon had purchased 3,183.37 BTC at an average cost of $117,697 per coin. In addition to its robust crypto acquisition, the company's board authorized a substantial expansion of its stock buyback program.

data.title: Federal Home Loan Bank of Des Moines reported Q2 2025 financial results: $194M net income, $21M AHP assessments, $114.8B in advances, and $145M dividend declared.
data.description: The article covers the financial highlights of the Federal Home Loan Bank of Des Moines for the second quarter of 2025. Some key numbers include a net income of $194 million, Affordable Housing Program assessments of $21 million, voluntary contributions of $43 million, advances totaling $114.8 billion, mortgage loans held for portfolio at $13.2 billion, and letters of credit at $17.7 billion. The bank made dividend payments totaling $145 million, and its total assets increased to $190 billion. The Bank aims to provide liquidity for housing and economic development needs, with its housing and community programs playing a vital role. The Bank contributes to the Affordable Housing Program and offers voluntary programs to support affordable housing initiatives. Financially, the Bank recorded a net income of $194 million for the quarter and $399 million for the six months ending June 30, 2025. Total capital increased to $10.2 billion by June 30, 2025.

data.title: Tractor Supply launches Purina Days with discounts on pet and livestock products from July 28 to August 10.
data.description: Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO), the leading rural lifestyle retailer in the US, is initiating Purina Days to mark the summer season. This two-week celebration, running from July 28 to August 10, will feature exclusive deals and activities for pet and livestock owners. Customers can look forward to discounts on a variety of Purina products for companion animals, equine, livestock, and poultry. Additionally, Tractor Supply is extending an invitation to all individuals to participate in this event.

data.title: New Spanish-language podcast "True Crime en Español: Secretos de Leyenda" by reVolver Podcasts dives into viral legends, debuting on July 25, 2025.
data.description: Unveiling the Viral Legends Defining a Generation: reVolver Podcasts and World Media Pictures Reveal Exciting New Content DALLAS, 25th July 2025 - Exciting news as reVolver Podcasts presents True Crime en Español: Secretos de Leyenda, a captivating Spanish-language podcast series. This collaboration with World Media Pictures delves into impactful viral legends that have influenced a generation. Stay tuned for this debut as it promises to enthrall audiences with gripping content.

data.title: Info-Tech Research Group emphasizes strategic automation for IT ops improvement amid pressure to reduce downtime and scale effectively.
data.description: New findings from Info-Tech Research Group highlight the growing demands on IT departments to improve service recovery speed, decrease downtime, and enhance scalability. The research indicates that the implementation of automation is most effective when it is integrated with process maturity and strategic goals, as opposed to simply adding it as an extra layer. The study underscores the importance of aligning automation strategies with established processes and overall objectives in order to maximize success.

data.title: Cloud storage service TeraBox introduces AI toolkit for content creation, enhancing productivity in cloud space. Launch in Tokyo.
data.description: A new set of AI productivity tools has been introduced by TeraBox, a leading cloud storage provider based in Tokyo. This toolkit, designed to streamline content creation in the cloud-native sector, enables users to generate content with just one click. The company unveiled this innovation on July 25, 2025, aiming to enhance efficiency and user experience. TeraBox's headquarters in Tokyo serves as the hub for these globally recognized cloud services, ensuring seamless operations for their wide customer base.

data.title: Shanton Pharma's SAP-001 for refractory gout program gets Fast Track Designation from US FDA.
data.description: Shanton Pharma, a clinical-stage biotech company, has disclosed that SAP-001, its main investigational compound, shows promise as a First- and Best-in-Class option for uncontrolled gout. The company, headquartered in Singapore and Princeton, N.J., made this statement on July 25, 2025. The FDA has recently acknowledged the development, emphasizing its potential significance in the treatment of gout.

data.title: Centralization crisis = threat to data privacy due to reliance on centralized cloud & IRS's proposed "mega API." Decentralized tech can help.
data.description: Dependence on centralized cloud infrastructure and the IRS's introduction of the proposed "mega API" highlight vulnerabilities in data privacy and accountability. Decentralized technologies offer solutions to these issues.
